calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
